real_world_fixture.license: X-Plane proprietary; not redistributable; gitignored via iteration-1/.gitignore

acceptance_criteria.text: Agent runs end-to-end without manual hand-off, OR documents friction points in _state_of_play.md and a follow-up issue is filed for each.
At least one real-world .dsf fixture round-trips with byte-equality.
Findings written up at iteration-1/findings.md summarizing what worked first try, where the agent got stuck, and what changes the run motivates.

expected_friction: Spec extraction: vendor HTML, may need pandoc fallback in extract-binary-spec.
Decoder: ATOM-style nested containers exercise the inner-action-loop pattern.
Encoder: MD5 footer must be deferred until after the body is written.
Round-trip: byte-equality on a real .dsf is the strongest verification gate.
